description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New announcement (published July 22, 2026)

Starting Monday, August 31, 2026 (Reiwa 8), internal extension numbers for departments at Hanno City Hall will change.

We have posted an updated extension number directory for each department.

Extension number directory (PDF file: 114.9KB)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/shisankeieika/13925.html
summary: ℹ️ Changes to internal extension numbers for city hall departments
